Our Menu

  • Home
  • Menu

A Culinary Journey Through Italy

Taste Italy’s Best on Every Plate

At Venice Pizza House, our menu brings the heart of Italy to San Diego. From time-honored recipes to hand-tossed pizzas, every dish is crafted to perfection with the finest ingredients. We offer a wide variety of Italian specialties, ensuring there’s something for everyone to enjoy.

Our Menu

Lunch Specials

Mondays - Saturdays | 11am - 3pm
Includes Soup or Salad & Garlic Bread

  • Small Antipasto $12

    Served With Soup

  • Ravioli $17

    Topped With Marinara or Meat Sauce

  • Lasagna $17

    Meat Or Veggie

  • Chicken Parmesan $18

    Served With Spaghetti

  • Eggplant Parmesan $18

Appetizers

  • Venice Sampler $22

    Wings, mozzarella sticks, and fried zucchini served with marinara sauce and ranch.

  • Calamari Small:$14.50 - Large:$24.50

    Coated in seasoned flour, deep-fried, and served with marinara sauce.

  • Steamed Clams $18

    Sautéed in white wine, butter, garlic, tomato, and green onion, served with garlic bread.

  • Chicken Wings Six:$12 - Twelve:$20

    Buffalo, BBQ, or plain, served with ranch.

  • Spinach & Artichoke Dip $11

    Served with buttered parmesan bread.

  • Garlic Toast $6

    Served with marinara sauce.

  • Caprese Garlic Toast $13

    Garlic bread topped with sliced tomato, fresh mozzarella, fresh basil, and balsamic glaze.

  • Garlic Cheese Bread $11

    Served with marinara sauce.

  • Fried Artichoke Hearts $12

    Hand-rolled in Italian breadcrumbs, deep-fried, and served with lemon garlic aioli.

  • Fried Zucchini $11

    Served with ranch.

  • Mozzarella Sticks $12

    Served with marinara sauce.

  • Jalapeño Poppers $12

    Served with ranch.

  • Basket of Fries $7

    Served with ketchup.

  • Appetizer Tray $12

    Pepperoni, provolone wedges, olives, and pepperoncini.

  • Pepperoncinis and Olives $6

Specialty Pizzas

All of our Pizza's are one size, 12 inch 8 slices

  • The Works $24

    VPH Customer Favorite since 1954 - sausage, pepperoni and mushrooms

  • House Special $26

    Sausage, pepperoni, olives, mushrooms and green peppers

  • Vegetarian $25

    Mushrooms, olives, green peppers and onions

  • Veggie Bomb $28

    Mushroom, tomato, jalapeno, onion, olives, green pepper, garlic

  • Chicken Pesto Garlic $24

    Chicken with pesto and fresh garlic.

  • Chicken Cordon Bleu $25

    Chicken breast, ham and Swiss cheese, topped with Alfredo sauce.

  • Barbecue Chicken $25

    Chicken breast, red onion and scallions, with tangy BBQ sauce.

  • Meat Lovers $26

    Sausage, pepperoni, Canadian bacon and meatball.

  • Lasagna Pizza $24

    Meat or marinara sauce, sausage, meatball, ricotta.

  • The Mediterranean $27

    Thin crust, olives, red onion, roasted red peppers, artichoke hearts, light cheese and feta, drizzled with olive oil and oregano.

  • Margarita Pizza $23

    Tomato, garlic, basil

  • Plain Cheese $20

    Classic, no-frills cheese pizza.

  • 1 Topping Pizza $22
  • 2 Topping Pizza $24
  • 3 Topping Pizza $26
  • 4 Topping Pizza $27

  • Gluten Free Pizza $16
  • Each Topping $2
  • Add Chicken $6
  • Calzone Di Venezia 29.99

    Hand-crafted with mozzarella & any five toppings of your choice. brushed with garlic butter & parmesan, & served with marinara sauce

Italian Dishes

Make it a dinner for $3 more: dinners include soup or salad & garlic bread.

  • Venice Special $20

    VPH Customer Favorite since 1954 - Spaghetti and/or ravioli (choice of cheese or meat filling) with choice of meat or marinara, sauce, and either 2 meatballs or 1 sausage.

  • Linguine with Clams $21

    Served with red or white sauce.

  • Fettuccine Alfredo $20

    Fettucine pasta tossed with our creamy Alfredo sauce.
    Add Chicken $6, Add Shrimp $9

  • Manicotti $19

    Handmade crepes, stuffed with 4 cheeses and basil, smothered in meat or marinara sauce, topped with mozzarella cheese.

  • Chicken Parmesan $21

    An 8oz chicken breast, breaded in our own blend of crumbs, topped with meat or marinara sauce, and baked with mozzarella cheese. Includes a side of spaghetti.

  • Meat Lasagna $20

    Layered with creamy ricotta and our homemade Italian sausage, topped with mozzarella cheese.

  • Veggie Lasagna $20

    A blend of artichokes, spinach, garlic and roasted red pepper, layered with our creamy ricotta mixture and marinara sauce.

  • Eggplant Parmesan $20

    Sliced eggplant, breaded and baked with meat or marinara sauce, topped with mozzarella cheese. Includes a side of spaghetti

  • Seafood Alfredo $27

    Shrimp, Scallops, Whole Clams & Alfredo sauce served on Fettuccine.

  • Ravioli $20

    Beef or spinach and cheese ravioli, topped with meat or marinara sauce

  • Tortellini $20

    Stuffed with chesse topped with meat or marinara sauce. Add Alfredo sauce for $4

  • Mama's Meatloaf $22

    Blend of our homemade sausage, ground beef, italian herbs and cheeses, topped with mozzarella cheese.
    *Includes a side of spaghetti*

Dinners:

  • Make It A Dinner $3

    All dinners include soup or salad, & garlic bread.

  • Upgrade Your Salad $6

    Upgrade to a Caesar, Greek, or Combination Salad

Build Your Own Pasta Dinner

Dinners include: soup or salad, garlic roll

  • Dinner $20
  • A La Carte $17

Choose a Pasta:

Spaghetti, Linguini, Fettuccine, Penne, Gluten-Free Penne, Rigatoni

  • Add Chicken $6
  • Add Shrimp $9
  • Scallops $9

Choose a Sauce:

Butter, Garlic Butter, Marinara, Meat Sauce, Olive Oil and Garlic

Premium Sauces:

  • Add (+) $4.25

    Pesto, Alfredo, Rose (Marinara + Alfredo)

Salads

Dressings: Homemade Italian / Bleu Cheese / Ranch / Caesar

  • Antipasto Salad Small:$12 - Large:$17

    Iceberg & romaine lettuce, purple cabbage, celery mix, tomato, olives, pepperoncini, salami & provolone.

  • Combo Salad Small:$11 - Large:$16

    Iceberg & romaine lettuce, purple cabbage, diced tomato, olives, celery, scallions and pepperoncini.

  • Caesar Salad Small:$10 - Large:$16

    Romaine lettuce, grated parmesan, croutons and Caesar dressing.

  • Greek Salad Small:$11 - Large:$16

    Romaine lettuce, tomato, olives, red onions, pepperoncini and feta cheese

  • Caprese Salad $12

    Fresh mozzarella cheese, sliced tomato & fresh basil. Topped with balsamic vinaigrette.

  • Dinner Salad $6

    Small salad for one person, contains iceberg lettuce, tomato, and pepperoncini.

Add to any salad:

  • Chicken $6
  • Shrimp $9
  • Scallops $9

Appetizers

About Us

With a legacy of nearly seven decades, Venice Pizza House has become a trusted name in Italian cuisine. Each meal is prepared with care and quality, combining Italy's best flavors with a welcoming environment that turns a meal into an experience.
